findings.description: The footnote definition for '入力値' is not present in the knowledge file. The source defines it as 'ユーザ入力値や外部システムからの連携データ' (footnote [#0]). This definition is referenced twice in the SQL injection section and clarifies that data from external systems must also be treated as untrusted input — relevant to security implementation scope.
findings.source_evidence: .. [#0] 入力値とは、ユーザ入力値や外部システムからの連携データの事である。
